metadata.name: File a Complaint with the Court

description: A paralegal needs to electronically file a new complaint with a federal court.

nodes.task_description: Convert the final complaint document to a text-searchable PDF.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a compliant PDF file.

nodes.task_description: Log in to the court's CM/ECF (Case Management/Electronic Case Files) system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully accesses the e-filing portal.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a new civil case, enter all party information, and upload the complaint PDF.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly enters all data and uploads the document.

nodes.task_description: Pay the filing fee and save the receipt and notice of electronic filing.

expected_outcome.value: The complaint is successfully filed, and a new case is opened.
